speaker: Gabrielle
content: Oh my god, Carlos, what have you done?

speaker: Carlos
content: I saw it when I drove by dealership, I thought Gabrielle would look so beautiful in this. Cost me an arm and a leg.
mark: dealership n. 特许经销商（店）（尤指汽车经销商）
Cost me an arm and a leg. 这可花了我一大笔钱。用于形容某物价格极其昂贵。

speaker: Carlos
content: It's got GPS navigation, 200 watt stereo system, rear parking sensors.
mark: It’s got ... == It has got.. 强调某物处于某种状态或具有某种特性
watt n. 瓦，瓦特（电功率单位）
stereo n. 立体声；立体声音响设备 stereo system 立体声音响系统
rear n. 后部，背部 adj. 后方的，背部的 v. 养育，饲养；栽种；adv. 在后面
sensor n. （探测光、热、压力等的）传感器，敏感元件，探测设备
rear parking sensors 倒车雷达或泊车辅助系统

speaker: Carlos
content: So did I take your breath away?
mark: take your breath away 形容某事或某人非常令人惊叹、震撼或感动，以至于让人无法呼吸。

speaker: Carlos
content: Is it the best gift you've ever gotten?
mark: got 和 gotten 都是 get 的过去分词形式, gotten主要用于美式英语,更强调动作的过程和变化

speaker: Alice
content: Gabrielle could see what this gesture had cost Carlos, so she responded the only way she knew how.
mark: Gabrielle could see what this gesture had cost Carlos. == Gabrielle could see that this gesture had cost Carlos a lot of money. 第二句更具体地指出了cost的 是很多钱
gesture n. 手势，姿势；姿态，表示 V. 打手势，用动作示意
she responded the only way she knew how.  how是一个连接副词，引导一个宾语从句，作动词knew的宾语。how (to respond)

speaker: Alice
content: She had a feeling the truth would've been lost on her husband anyway. After all, it's the rare man who understands the value of a single perfect rose.
mark: be lost on sb 未被某人理解；对某人不起作用
rare adj.少见的，不常发生的；稀罕的 the rare man 这样少有的、不寻常的人
it's the rare man who ... 是一个强调句型, 很少有人...
